description: The RadiantModalOverlay component is similar to the ModalOverlay, but with the dash menu. This also can be duplicated as a template in the ModalOverlayManager component.

fields.ShowLerp: The lerp amount for this modal.
fields.AnimationTime: The lerp time for this modal.
fields.ContentRoot: The center root of this modal.
fields.CloseOnContextMenuAction: Closes the modal when the user's context menu closes.
fields.CloseOnClick: Closes this modal when it is clicked on.
fields.BackgroundColor: The background color of this RadiantModalOverlay.
fields.ContentAnimationScaleOffset: Offests the content animation for this RadiantModalOverlay.
fields.HeaderSize: The header size of this RadiantModalOverlay.
fields.Padding: The padding amount for this RadiantModalOverlay.
fields._blurGraphic: The blur graphic of this RadiantModalOverlay.
fields._blurSpread: The blur speed of this RadiantModalOverlay.
fields._backgroundColor: The background color of this RadiantModalOverlay.
fields._maskRect: The mask rect of this RadiantModalOverlay.
fields._headerOffsetMin: The header offset min of this RadiantModalOverlay.
fields._headerOffsetMax: The header offset max of this RadiantModalOverlay.
fields._contentOffsetMin: The content offset min of this RadiantModalOverlay.
fields._contentOffsetMax: The content offset max of this RadiantModalOverlay.
fields._titleOffsetMin: The title offset min of this RadiantModalOverlay.
fields._titleOffsetMax: The title offset max of this RadiantModalOverlay.
fields._closeOffsetMin: The close offset min of this RadiantModalOverlay.
fields._closeOffsetMax: The close offset max of this RadiantModalOverlay.

methods.DoClose: Called when this UI is closed.
